message:
fix(codegen): Add getattr/hasattr/setattr dispatch in comprehensions and fix function name shadowing

Two fixes for compile errors:

1. Comprehensions with getattr/hasattr/setattr: These builtins were falling
   through to the else branch which emitted raw function names instead of
   dispatching to the proper runtime helpers. Added explicit cases to
   genBuiltinCallWithSubs that call dynamic_attrs.gen{Get|Has|Set}attr.

2. Function name shadowing: When a local variable has the same name as the
   enclosing method (e.g., `finder = self.finder(spec)` inside method `finder`),
   Zig rejects it as shadowing. Added check for `shadows_current_function` to
   automatically rename such variables with a suffix.
